constitutional_invariant.llm_proposes: Provider assistance may contribute review text but remains non-authoritative.
constitutional_invariant.aigol_governs: AiGOL validates proposal evidence and records review-only artifacts.
constitutional_invariant.worker_executes: Worker output remains upstream evidence, not review or approval authority.
constitutional_invariant.replay_records: Improvement review recorded and returned events are persisted as append-only replay artifacts.

known_limits: Improvement Review Runtime creates review-only artifacts.
Approval recommendation is not approval or rejection.
Improvement Approval Runtime is not implemented.
Implementation Planning Runtime is not implemented.
Execution request creation from reviewed improvements is not implemented.
Reflection, self-improvement, and self-application remain out of scope.
